name: Legion the Fiend Jester
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>道</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>け</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>リジョン
desc: During your Main Phase, you can Tribute Summon 1 Spellcaster monster in Attack Position, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can add 1 Spellcaster Normal Monster from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Legion the Fiend Jester" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase, you can Tribute Summon 1 Spellcaster monster in Attack Position, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)
